parameters.query:
SELECT id, phone, external_id
FROM public.leads
WHERE phone = '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.phone }}'
   OR external_id = '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.phone }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  content,
  status,
  provider_status,
  created_at
FROM public.messages
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead").item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'outbound'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.sent_at }}'::timestamptz
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  flow_name,
  decision,
  meta,
  idempotency_key,
  created_at
FROM public.audit_logs
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead").item.json.id }}'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.sent_at }}'::timestamptz
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO public.qa_test_results (
  run_id,
  scenario_id,
  scenario_name,
  step_index,
  text_sent,
  passed,
  errors,
  lead_id,
  state_snapshot,
  bot_response,
  audit_snapshot,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  NULLIF('{{ ($json.run_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),

  NULLIF('{{ ($json.scenario_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),

  NULLIF('{{ ($json.scenario_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),

  {{ Number($json.step_index || 0) }},

  NULLIF('{{ ($json.text_sent || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),

  {{ $json.passed === true ? 'true' : 'false' }},

  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.errors || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,

  NULLIF('{{ ($json.lead_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::uuid,

  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.state_snapshot || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,

  NULLIF('{{ ($json.bot_response || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),

  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.audit_snapshot || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,

  NOW()
)
RETURNING
  id,
  run_id,
  scenario_id,
  step_index,
  passed,
  created_at;

WITH old_leads AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM public.leads
  WHERE phone = '{{ ($json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
     OR external_id = '{{ ($json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
),

deleted_messages AS (
  DELETE FROM public.messages m
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE m.lead_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_state AS (
  DELETE FROM public.lead_state s
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE s.lead_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_audits AS (
  DELETE FROM public.audit_logs a
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE a.lead_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_quotes AS (
  DELETE FROM public.offers_or_quotes q
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE q.lead_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_followups AS (
  DELETE FROM public.followups f
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE f.lead_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_appointments AS (
  DELETE FROM public.appointments ap
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE ap.conversation_id::text = l.id::text
),

deleted_leads AS (
  DELETE FROM public.leads le
  USING old_leads l
  WHERE le.id::text = l.id::text
),

new_lead AS (
  INSERT INTO public.leads (
    channel,
    external_id,
    phone,
    name,
    created_at,
    updated_at
  )
  VALUES (
    'whatsapp',
    '{{ ($json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ ($json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'Cliente QA',
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  )
  RETURNING id
),

new_state AS (
  INSERT INTO public.lead_state (
    lead_id,
    stage,
    intent_last,
    interest_score,
    service_interest,
    vehicle_type,
    district,
    missing_fields,
    last_bot_action,
    next_goal,
    human_handoff,
    updated_at
  )
  SELECT
    id,
    'new_lead',
    NULL,
    0,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    '[]'::jsonb,
    NULL,
    'qualify_lead',
    false,
    NOW()
  FROM new_lead
  RETURNING lead_id
)

SELECT
  '{{ ($json.id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS id,
  '{{ ($json.name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS name,
  '{{ ($json.phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS phone,
  '{{ ($json.run_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AS run_id,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.steps || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb AS steps,
  (SELECT lead_id FROM new_state LIMIT 1) AS qa_lead_id;

SELECT id, phone, external_id
FROM public.leads
WHERE phone = '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.phone }}'
   OR external_id = '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.phone }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM public.lead_state
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead_before").item.json.id }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  content,
  status,
  provider_status,
  created_at
FROM public.messages
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead_before").item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'outbound'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.sent_at }}'::timestamptz
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM public.lead_state
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead").item.json.id }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  content,
  status,
  provider_status,
  created_at
FROM public.messages
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead_before").item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'outbound'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.sent_at }}'::timestamptz
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  content,
  status,
  provider_status,
  created_at
FROM public.messages
WHERE lead_id::text = '{{ $("get_lead_before").item.json.id }}'
  AND direction = 'outbound'
  AND created_at >= '{{ $("build_inbound_payload").item.json.sent_at }}'::timestamptz
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

json.name: Cotización directa debe enviar mensaje, actualizar estado y auditar

steps.text: cuánto sale lavado premium para SUV en Huechuraba
